query: SELECT 'customers' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customers WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'orders', COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'products', COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE rawData IS NOT NULL;
